title: Chickens Give Feathers
description: Chickens drop feathers when they lay an egg!
body:
# Chickens Give Fathers

This can usefull for people who don't want to kill chickens for feathers.💀 

With this mod chickens drop feathers [1-2] when they lay an egg!

## ⚠️ Warrning ⚠️
Mod requires Java 21. Many Minecraft launchers use older versions of Java for older versions of Minecraft. You should be able to choose the Java version in your launcher settings.

## Happy Chicken in a Boat
![Chicken in a boat with an egg and a feather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63ecac56908a30623566ec5951659aeb7c3423c4.webp)
